onboarding.welcomeTitle: Let's set up your life OS
onboarding.welcomeBody: Nexus pulls your finances, fitness, studies, work and habits into one score — so you can see how your life is trending at a glance.
onboarding.profileBody: This sets which domains shape your Life Score. You can fine-tune the mix anytime in Settings.
onboarding.profileCustomHint: Prefer a custom mix? Set it later in Settings → Life Profile.
onboarding.domainsBody: These domains will feed your Life Score. Greyed-out ones are off in this profile.
onboarding.goalBody: Goals give your Life Score something to track against — a net-worth target, a workout count, a GPA. Optional; you can add them anytime.
